---
title: "The Rev. John Medley"
---

## The Rev. John Medley

### Description

presumably the son of Christina Bacon

### Biography

Christina Bacon married the Rt. Rev. John Medley (1804-1892), bishop of Fredericton; presumably this was their son.

### Letters

- [To Frederick Orridge Macmillan, July 12th 1898](../letters/3379_To_Frederick_Orridge_Macmillan.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
